---
title: "Software"
---

## R Packages on CRAN

| Package | Status | Description | CRAN | GitHub | Docs | Publication |
|---------|--------|-------------|------|--------|------|-------------|
| serocalculator | Active | Estimate seroconversion rates and frequencies from antibody levels in cross-sectional samples | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=serocalculator) | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/serocalculator) | [Docs](https://ucd-serg.github.io/serocalculator/) | |
| rwicc | Archived | Regression with interval-censored covariates | [CRAN Archive](https://CRAN.R-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/rwicc) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rwicc) | [Docs](https://d-morrison.github.io/rwicc/) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1111/biom.13472) |

---

## My Repositories

Repositories under my personal GitHub account and the [UCD-SERG](https://github.com/UCD-SERG) organization.

### R Packages

| Package | Description | GitHub |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| rmb | Data sets from *Regression Methods in Biostatistics* (Vittinghoff et al.) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rmb) |
| snapr | Convenient snapshot testing functions for R packages | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr) |
| pr.helpers | Generalization of pull-request helper functions from `{usethis}` | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/pr.helpers) |
| binom.se | Sample size calculations for Bernoulli probability estimation | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/binom.se) |
| CSICalc | Methods for estimating incidence from cross-sectional biomarker surveys | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/CSICalc) |
| ping | Graph ping data in R | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/ping) |

### Quarto Extensions

| Extension | Description | GitHub |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| slidebreak | Insert slide breaks into Quarto revealjs presentations | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/slidebreak) |
| revealjs-html-links | Enable HTML-style links in revealjs presentations | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/revealjs-html-links) |
| div-anchors | Anchors for theorem-variant divs in Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/div-anchors) |
| equation-anchors | Anchors for numbered equations in Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/equation-anchors) |
| qet | Quarto extension template | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/qet) |
| macros | Shared macro definitions for Quarto documents | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/macros) |

### Quarto Books & Templates

| Project | Description | GitHub |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| rme | *Regression Models for Epidemiology* — an open Quarto textbook | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme) |
| qwt | Template for building websites with Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/qwt) |

### Shiny Applications

| App | Description | GitHub |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| shiny.demos | Teaching demos for Shiny applications | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/shiny.demos) |
| UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator | Shiny app for the `serocalculator` package | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator) |
| UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve | Shiny app to display antibody decay curves | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve) |

### Analysis & Research Code

| Repo | Description | GitHub |
|------|-------------|--------|
| vax.eff | Code from "Estimating Vaccine Effectiveness from Linking Population-Based Health Registries" (Brookmeyer & Morrison, *AJE*, 2022) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/vax.eff) |
| LA.Vax.Data | Pre-processes LA County vaccination rates by community statistical area | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/LA.Vax.Data) |
| hybrid.charts.la | Adaptation of Wisconsin COVID-19 data visualizations for Los Angeles County | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/hybrid.charts.la) |
| UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence | Analysis of seroincidence of enteric fever in Juba, South Sudan | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence) |
| EM.examples | Examples of EM algorithms | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/EM.examples) |
| github-stats | Tools for computing personal GitHub contribution statistics | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/github-stats) |

---

## External Contributions

Merged pull requests I have made to repositories outside my own accounts, ordered by recency.

| Repository | Description | Merged PRs |
|------------|-------------|------------|
| [ucdavis/rSuStaIn](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn) | R implementation of the SuStaIn (Subtype and Stage Inference) algorithm | [PRs](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ucdavis/win](https://github.com/ucdavis/win) | UC Davis WIN (Workforce Inequity in Neuroscience) project | [PRs](https://github.com/ucdavis/win/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ucdavis/ettbc](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc) | Enteric disease burden estimation | [PRs](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem) | Quarto extension for callout-style theorem environments | [PRs](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm) | Agent-based model of infection dynamics in K-6 schools during COVID-19 | [PRs](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR](https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR) | R package for tidying REDCap exports | [PRs](https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [Nowosad/colorblindcheck](https://github.com/Nowosad/colorblindcheck) | R package for checking colorblind accessibility of color palettes | [PRs](https://github.com/Nowosad/colorblindcheck/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [r-quantities/units](https://github.com/r-quantities/units) | Measurement units for R vectors | [PRs](https://github.com/r-quantities/units/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [r-lib/scales](https://github.com/r-lib/scales) | Scale functions for ggplot2 | [PRs](https://github.com/r-lib/scales/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [UCD-IDDRC/fxtas](https://github.com/UCD-IDDRC/fxtas) | Analysis code for Fragile X-associated tremor/ataxia syndrome | [PRs](https://github.com/UCD-IDDRC/fxtas/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ucdavis/serodynamics](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics) | Bayesian modeling of antibody dynamics for seroepidemiology | [PRs](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [hadley/mastering-shiny](https://github.com/hadley/mastering-shiny) | *Mastering Shiny* book by Hadley Wickham | [PRs](https://github.com/hadley/mastering-shiny/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [UCLA-PHP/FluView](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/FluView) | Flu surveillance data visualization | [PRs](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/FluView/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ajmichaelucd/mic.sim](https://github.com/ajmichaelucd/mic.sim) | Simulation of minimum inhibitory concentration (MIC) distributions | [PRs](https://github.com/ajmichaelucd/mic.sim/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ucjug/workshop_julia_basics](https://github.com/ucjug/workshop_julia_basics) | UC Davis Julia Users Group introductory workshop materials | [PRs](https://github.com/ucjug/workshop_julia_basics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior](https://github.com/ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior) | Oral health brushing behavior analysis | [PRs](https://github.com/ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [UCLA-PHP/wastewater](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/wastewater) | Wastewater surveillance analysis | [PRs](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/wastewater/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [easystats/parameters](https://github.com/easystats/parameters) | Parameters and statistical summaries for model objects in R | [PRs](https://github.com/easystats/parameters/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [glmmTMB/glmmTMB](https://github.com/glmmTMB/glmmTMB) | Generalized linear mixed models via Template Model Builder | [PRs](https://github.com/glmmTMB/glmmTMB/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
| [edwindj/ffbase](https://github.com/edwindj/ffbase) | Base R functions for `ff` large-data objects | [PRs](https://github.com/edwindj/ffbase/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+author%3Ad-morrison) |
